interactions: Ana : Aren't you a relic? A Siege Automaton E-54 ... your kind left a grave wound on this world. Bastion : *hesitant beeps* Ana : Come to think of it, I suppose we aren't so different.
Baptiste : Have you all seen what this guy can do? Bastion : * bashful beeps *
Brigitte : Bastion, how are you liking that new armor Papa made for you? Bastion : * encouraging beeps*
Brigitte : Bastion, is something wrong? Bastion : * concerned and puzzled beep* Brigitte : Your bird-feed was stolen again? * sigh * I'll have to have a word with that hamster .

Cassidy : Bastion. Have you by chance got a can-opener in there? I'm aiming to crack open a snack. Bastion : *regretful beeps* Cassidy : Of course not... would be wholly unlike Lindholm to give you something useful.
D.Va : Whoa, that gun must do a ton of DPS! Bastion : * proud beeps *
D.Va : We should get Ganymede to scout for us! Bastion : * worried beeps * D.Va : Don't worry! No one will touch a feather on Gany's head while Hana Song is here! Bastion : * relieved beeps *
Bastion : * sad beeps * Echo : * comforting beeps * Bastion : * grateful beeps * Echo : Any time, my friend. Any time.

Junker Queen : I fought a bunch of you Bastions once. You all had wheels and big sharp teeth. Bastion : * confused beeping * Junker Queen : On second thought, that might have been a dream I had... Bastion : * understanding beeping *

Junkrat: Jamison Fawkes, channel nine news. Mr. Gunbot, sir, how do you think the battle's going to go? Bastion: * excited, talkative beeps * Junkrat: Could you repeat that in words? Hold on, breaking news! The moon has fallen into the ocean!
Lúcio : Alright, let's hear that fighting spirit! Bastion : * spirited beeps * Lúcio : That is exactly what I'm talking about! Woo!
Lúcio: Can I get a beat? Bastion: *beep boxing* Lúcio: Haha, perfect! You're the best.
Lúcio: So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Bastion: *elephant beeping* Lúcio: Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Orisa: Is that you, E54? I barely recognized you! Bastion: * retorting beeps *
Ramattra: You appear to have a bird following you. Why? Bastion: (explanatory beeps) Ramattra: Interesting. Well, if I see any twigs, I will let you know.
Reinhardt : Let's attack the enemy from the front and take them by surprise! Bastion : * worried beeps * Reinhardt : You hear that? Bastion agrees with me! Bastion : * panicky beeps *
Reinhardt : I killed many of your kind here , Bastion. Bastion : * timid beeps *
Sojourn : So, Bastion, how are you... settling in? Anything you... need? Bastion : *straightforward beeps* Sojourn : Yeah, uh... Sounds good!
Sombra : Did you know you have a locked storage drive? Bastion : *inquisitive beeps* Sombra : *whistle* Good encryption. You should be proud. Bastion : *proud beeps*
Torbjörn : Bastion, I bet you haven't had a systems check in years... who knows what kind of weird behaviors you've picked up. Bastion : * surprised denial *
Torbjörn : For the last time, tell Ganymede my beard is not a nest! Bastion : * disappointed beeps * Torbjörn : Don't you "beep boop" me. No is no!
Torbjörn : Remind me to install a firewall system in you. Can't be too careful nowadays. Bastion : * happy beeps *
Bastion : * cheers, love beeps * Tracer : That... sounds awfully familiar.
Widowmaker : You're lucky you're a robot. Bastion : * confused beeps * Widowmaker : That was not an invitation to talk to me.
Bastion: * curious beeps * Wrecking Ball: * hamster noises * Bastion: * fascinated beeps * Wrecking Ball: Alert: translation buffer full.
Zarya : Good thinking, omnic! Uh... processing. Whatever. Bastion : * giggly beeps *
Bastion : * gruff, Torbjörn-inspired beeps * Zenyatta : I believe that Torbjörn's behavior has rubbed off on you.
